content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears to be slightly left of center but on track.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 48, target = 48 + 5 = 53
- Waypoint 53: (4.7352, 2.8213)
- Car position: (5.5756, 2.6130)
- Bearing = atan2(2.8213 - 2.6130, 4.7352 - 5.5756) = atan2(0.2083, -0.8404)
- = 180 - atan2(0.2083, 0.8404) = 180 - 13.92° = 166.08°
- Current heading: -176.74° → equivalent to 183.26°
- Delta = 166.08 - 183.26 = -17.18° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, delta to target waypoint 53 is -17.18° indicating a moderate right correction needed, applying -15 steering to follow the waypoint line through the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due left/west) along y≈2.77",
    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 52-60 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is consistently ~0.15m left of center through this section — slight left bias",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.15m left of center is safe but watch for tightening",
    "Heading is ~-177° (essentially due west), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -12 to -17° in this section confirms consistent right curve",
    "Speed 1.5 appropriate here; reduce only for sharp turns >30° delta",
    "Waypoints 48-53 show gradual right curve toward y≈2.82"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.8700, 5.7700, 5.6765, 5.5756],
    "y": [2.6587, 2.6442, 2.6283, 2.6130],
    "yaw": [170.865, 176.825, -179.042, -176.744]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -17.18,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
